definitions.text: To take a temporary rest, take a break for a short period after an effort.
To stop (an activity) for a while.
To interrupt an activity and wait.
examples: When telling the scary story, he paused for effect.

definitions.text: A temporary stop or rest; an intermission of action; interruption; suspension; cessation.
A short time for relaxing and doing something else.
Used immediately after a statement to indicate that there was no innuendo or homosexual meaning intended, especially when such a meaning is a reasonable interpretation.
